# DiffBuddy Privacy Policy

_Last updated: 2026-04-07_

DiffBuddy ("the App") is a macOS application developed by naritoshi karimata.
This document describes how the App handles user information.

## Summary

**DiffBuddy does not collect, transmit, or store any personal data.**
All text and files you provide to the App are processed entirely on your
local Mac and are never sent to the developer or any third party.

## Data we collect

None. The App:

- Does not require an account.
- Does not include analytics, telemetry, or crash reporting.
- Does not contain third-party SDKs that collect data.
- Does not access the network. Texts and files you compare never leave
  your device.

## Files you open

When you open or drop a file into DiffBuddy, the App reads the file's
contents into memory only for the purpose of displaying its diff against
another text. The contents are not saved anywhere by the App and are
discarded when you close the window or quit.

## Permissions

DiffBuddy runs inside the macOS App Sandbox. It requests only the
"User Selected File" permission, which lets you open files that you
explicitly choose. It does not access any other locations on your Mac.

## Children's privacy

DiffBuddy is suitable for all ages and does not knowingly collect any
information from anyone, including children under 13.

## Changes to this policy

If this policy changes in the future, the updated version will be
published at the same URL with a new "Last updated" date.

## Contact
